## Checklist

- [ ] The diff is focused and excludes unrelated changes.
- [ ] Commit messages follow `README-GIT.md`.
- [ ] Documentation is updated for behavior, setup, CI, deployment, or public interface changes.
- [ ] No secrets, local env files, caches, build outputs, or temporary files are included.
